name: Waldine's Crawfish Corn Maquechoux
recipeIngredient: 12 Fresh ears of corn; cut off the cob
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a saucepan.
2. Add the chopped green and red peppers, onion, and tomato to the pan.
3. Cook the vegetables until the onions are translucent and the corn is beginning to become tender (if using fresh corn).
4. If using fresh corn, add it to the pan and continue cooking until all ingredients are combined and heated through.
5. Add the cooked crawfish tails for the last 10 minutes of cooking.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Allow the dish to cool before serving or freezing if desired.
